metadata.name: sms_forwarding
metadata.description: 超低成本硬件短信转发器，支持移动联通电信，ML307R+ESP32C3

summary.zh: 本项目是一款超低成本的硬件短信转发器，基于 ESP32C3 与 ML307R 模组构建。支持移动/联通/电信卡，通过 AT 指令实现短信接收与多通道自动转发。内置 Web 配置界面，兼容 Bark、钉钉、飞书、邮件等 7 种主流推送服务，适用于个人通知、保号及低成本物联网通信场景。
summary.en: An ultra-low-cost hardware SMS forwarding device built on ESP32C3 and ML307R modules. It supports China Mobile/Unicom/Telecom cards, receiving SMS via AT commands and forwarding to multiple channels. Features a web interface for configuration and supports 7 push services like Bark, DingTalk, Feishu, and Email, ideal for personal notifications and IoT communication.

metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: 该工具自动抓取 GitHub Stars 并利用 AI 生成摘要与技术标签，解决收藏库检索难题。支持标签归一化治理、GitHub Actions 定时增量同步，以及 Jinja2 模板渲染可搜索静态页。兼容 Obsidian 同步，是开发者管理技术资产与构建个人知识库的高效自动化方案。
summary.en: This tool automatically fetches GitHub Stars and generates AI summaries and tech tags to solve retrieval issues. It supports tag normalization, GitHub Actions scheduled incremental sync, and Jinja2 template rendering for searchable static pages. Compatible with Obsidian sync, it is an efficient automation solution for developers to manage tech assets and build personal knowledge bases.

metadata.name: GithubStarsManager
metadata.description: An app for managing github starred repositories.

summary.zh: GithubStarsManager 是一款跨平台桌面应用，专为管理 GitHub 星标仓库设计。它通过 AI 自动分类和生成摘要，支持语义搜索，解决“收藏即遗忘”的痛点。同时提供 Release 跟踪、一键下载、Fork 管理及 Gist 编辑功能，数据 100% 本地存储，保障隐私安全。
summary.en: GithubStarsManager is a cross-platform desktop app designed to manage GitHub starred repositories. It leverages AI to auto-categorize and summarize repos, enabling semantic search to solve the "star and forget" problem. It also offers release tracking, one-click downloads, fork management, and Gist editing, with 100% local data storage for privacy.
